definition: a period of 24 hours as a unit of time

sentence.en: In the modern era, processing vast amounts of data has become a day-to-day necessity for global enterprises.
sentence.uz: Zamonaviy davrda juda katta hajmdagi ma'lumotlarni qayta ishlash global korxonalar uchun kundalik ehtiyojga aylangan.

definition: past tense of do

sentence.en: The extensive research did reveal several critical vulnerabilities within the newly implemented cybersecurity framework.
sentence.uz: Keng ko'lamli tadqiqotlar yangi joriy etilgan kiberxavfsizlik tizimidagi bir qator jiddiy zaifliklarni aniqlab berdi.

definition: not the same as another or each other

sentence.en: Adapting to different cultural norms is essential for expatriates aiming to thrive in international business environments.
sentence.uz: Turli xil madaniy me'yorlarga moslashish xalqaro biznes muhitida muvaffaqiyat qozonishni maqsad qilgan chet ellik xodimlar uchun o'ta muhimdir.

definition: perform an action, the precise nature of which is often unspecified

sentence.en: Governments must do everything in their power to implement sustainable urban development policies before the situation deteriorates further.
sentence.uz: Hukumatlar vaziyat yanada yomonlashishidan oldin barqaror shaharsozlik siyosatini amalga oshirish uchun qo'llaridan kelgan barcha ishni qilishlari shart.

definition: third person singular present of do

sentence.en: Implementing a centralized database does streamline administrative processes, thereby significantly reducing operational costs.
sentence.uz: Markazlashtirilgan ma'lumotlar bazasini joriy etish ma'muriy jarayonlarni tartibga soladi va shu orqali operatsion xarajatlarni sezilarli darajada kamaytiradi (qiladi).

definition: do not

sentence.en: While some experts advocate for immediate intervention, others argue that we don't yet have sufficient data to proceed safely.
sentence.uz: Ba'zi mutaxassislar zudlik bilan aralashishni yoqlasalar-da, boshqalar xavfsiz davom etish uchun bizda hozircha yetarli ma'lumot yo'qligini ta'kidlaydilar.

definition: towards or in a lower place or position

sentence.en: The sudden economic recession forced several multinational corporations to shut down their less profitable regional branches.
sentence.uz: To'satdan yuz bergan iqtisodiy tanazzul bir nechta transmilliy korporatsiyalarni o'zining kam daromadli mintaqaviy filiallarini yopishga (pastga tushirishga) majbur qildi.

definition: used to refer to every one of two or more people or things

sentence.en: During the intensive workshop, each participant was required to present a detailed analysis of a real-world macroeconomic crisis.
sentence.uz: Intensiv seminar davomida har bir ishtirokchidan real dunyodagi makroiqtisodiy inqirozning batafsil tahlilini taqdim etish talab qilindi.

definition: the final part of something

sentence.en: By the end of the fiscal year, the corporation aims to have achieved a completely carbon-neutral operational footprint.
sentence.uz: Moliya yilining oxiriga kelib, korporatsiya butunlay uglerodsiz operatsion faoliyatga erishishni maqsad qilgan.

definition: used to emphasize something surprising or extreme

sentence.en: The architectural flaw was so subtle that even the most experienced structural engineers failed to detect it during the initial inspection.
sentence.uz: Arxitektura xatosi shu qadar sezilarsiz ediki, hatto eng tajribali qurilish muhandislari ham dastlabki tekshiruv davomida uni aniqlay olmadilar.

definition: used to refer to all the individual members of a set without exception

sentence.en: Ensuring that every citizen has equal access to high-quality healthcare remains a fundamental challenge for developing nations.
sentence.uz: Har bir fuqaroning yuqori sifatli sog'liqni saqlash xizmatlaridan teng foydalanishini ta'minlash rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlar uchun asosiy muammo bo'lib qolmoqda.

definition: a small number of

sentence.en: Despite the overwhelming consensus among climatologists, a few skeptics continue to dispute the severity of anthropogenic global warming.
sentence.uz: Iqlimshunoslar orasida ko'pchilik fikri yakdil bo'lishiga qaramay, bir necha shubha bilan qarovchilar antropogen global isishning jiddiyligi borasida bahslashishda davom etmoqdalar.

definition: discover or perceive by chance or unexpectedly

sentence.en: Researchers constantly strive to find innovative methodologies that can reliably predict catastrophic seismic events.
sentence.uz: Tadqiqotchilar halokatli seysmik hodisalarni ishonchli bashorat qila oladigan innovatsion metodologiyalarni topishga doimo intilishadi.

definition: coming before all others in time or order

sentence.en: The first comprehensive study on microplastics in the human bloodstream has raised profound alarms within the medical community.
sentence.uz: Inson qon oqimidagi mikroplastmassalar bo'yicha birinchi keng qamrovli tadqiqot tibbiyot hamjamiyatida chuqur xavotirlarni uyg'otdi.

definition: in support of or in favor of

sentence.en: The government allocated a substantial budget for the extensive restoration of the city's crumbling historical infrastructure.
sentence.uz: Hukumat shaharning nurab borayotgan tarixiy infratuzilmasini keng ko'lamli qayta tiklash uchun katta byudjet ajratdi.

definition: past tense of find

sentence.en: After conducting a series of rigorous double-blind trials, the scientists found that the experimental vaccine was highly effective.
sentence.uz: Bir qator qat'iy ikki tomonlama ko'r-kona sinovlarni o'tkazgandan so'ng, olimlar eksperimental vaksinaning o'ta samarali ekanligini topdilar (aniqladilar).

definition: indicating the point in space at which a journey, motion, or action starts

sentence.en: Transitioning from a fossil fuel-based economy to one powered by renewable energy necessitates unprecedented global cooperation.
sentence.uz: Qazib olinadigan yoqilg'iga asoslangan iqtisodiyotdan qayta tiklanadigan energiyaga asoslangan iqtisodiyotga o'tish misli ko'rilmagan xalqaro hamkorlikni talab qiladi (-dan).

definition: come to have or hold; receive

sentence.en: In order to get approval for the controversial housing project, the developers had to undergo an exhausting environmental assessment.
sentence.uz: Bahsli uy-joy loyihasini tasdiqlash (olish) uchun ishlab chiquvchilar charchatuvchi ekologik ekspertizadan o'tishlari kerak edi.

definition: freely transfer the possession of

sentence.en: Philanthropists frequently give substantial endowments to academic institutions to foster groundbreaking scientific research.
sentence.uz: Xayriyachilar ko'pincha ilg'or ilmiy tadqiqotlarni rivojlantirish uchun akademik muassasalarga katta miqdorda mablag' beradilar.

definition: move from one place to another; travel

sentence.en: Unless strict conservation measures are enacted, many endangered species will inevitably go extinct within the next decade.
sentence.uz: Agar qat'iy saqlash choralari ko'rilmasa, kelgusi o'n yil ichida ko'plab yo'qolib ketish xavfi ostida turgan turlar muqarrar ravishda qirilib ketadi (ketadi).

definition: to be desired or approved of

sentence.en: A robust educational system is not just inherently good for intellectual development, but it also drives long-term economic prosperity.
sentence.uz: Mustahkam ta'lim tizimi nafaqat intellektual rivojlanish uchun aslo yaxshi, balki uzoq muddatli iqtisodiy farovonlikni ham rag'batlantiradi.

definition: of an extent, amount, or intensity considerably above the normal or average

sentence.en: The sudden collapse of the global supply chain has caused great disruption across numerous manufacturing sectors worldwide.
sentence.uz: Global ta'minot zanjirining to'satdan qulashi butun dunyo bo'ylab ko'plab ishlab chiqarish sohalarida katta (ulkan) uzilishlarga olib keldi.

definition: past tense of have

sentence.en: By the time the rescue team arrived at the remote location, the survivors had already managed to build a temporary shelter.
sentence.uz: Qutqaruv guruhi uzoq hududga yetib kelguniga qadar, omon qolganlar allaqachon vaqtinchalik boshpana qurishga ulgurishgan edi (ega edilar).

definition: third person singular present of have

sentence.en: The rapid proliferation of artificial intelligence has sparked intense ethical debates among philosophers and technologists alike.
sentence.uz: Sun'iy intellektning tez tarqalishi faylasuflar va texnologlar orasida kuchli axloqiy bahs-munozaralarni keltirib chiqardi (ega).

definition: possess, own, or hold

sentence.en: Contemporary urban planners have increasingly prioritized green infrastructure to combat the adverse effects of urban heat islands.
sentence.uz: Zamonaviy shaharsozlar shahar issiqlik orollarining salbiy ta'siriga qarshi kurashish uchun yashil infratuzilmani tobora ustuvor vazifa qilib belgilamoqdalar (ega bo'lmoqdalar).

definition: used to refer to a man, boy, or male animal

sentence.en: Although he lacked formal political experience, the candidate's charismatic rhetoric resonated deeply with the disenfranchised voters.
sentence.uz: Garchi u rasmiy siyosiy tajribaga ega bo'lmasa-da, nomzodning jozibali nutqi huquqdan mahrum bo'lgan saylovchilarga chuqur ta'sir qildi.

definition: make it easier for (someone) to do something

sentence.en: Implementing progressive tax reforms could significantly help alleviate the widening wealth gap in contemporary societies.
sentence.uz: Progressiv soliq islohotlarini amalga oshirish zamonaviy jamiyatlarda kengayib borayotgan boylik tafovutini yumshatishga yordam berishi mumkin.

definition: used as the object of a verb or preposition to refer to a female person

sentence.en: The committee commended her for an incredibly thorough analysis that exposed the fundamental flaws in the corporate strategy.
sentence.uz: Qo'mita uni korporativ strategiyadagi asosiy kamchiliklarni fosh etuvchi puxta tahlili uchun maqtadi.

definition: in, at, or to this place or position

sentence.en: The core argument presented here illustrates the complex interplay between macroeconomic policy and individual consumer behavior.
sentence.uz: Bu yerda keltirilgan asosiy dalil makroiqtisodiy siyosat va shaxsiy iste'molchi xatti-harakatlari o'rtasidagi murakkab o'zaro bog'liqlikni ko'rsatadi.

definition: used as the object of a verb or preposition to refer to a male person

sentence.en: The unprecedented scale of the environmental disaster left him profoundly questioning the efficacy of existing regulatory frameworks.
sentence.uz: Ekologik ofatning misli ko'rilmagan ko'lami uni mavjud me'yoriy-huquqiy bazalarning samaradorligiga chuqur shubha qilishiga olib keldi.
